publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-17 18:05:08 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, photographs, cassette tapes, broadsides, programs, video tapes, awards.
did.abstract: Correspondence, sound and video recordings, miscellany documenting the Cornell University Chorus.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Chorus records, #14-20-3125. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Collection includes correspondence, photographs, cassette tapes, broadsides and posters, programs, newsletters, video tapes, and awards of the Cornell University Chorus.

did.unittitle: Cassette: Cornell Trustee Weekend Choral Concert
Cassette: November, Music of Bohuslav Martinu
Cassette: CBS Cavalcade of Christmas Music
Digital Audio Tape: Star Spangled Banner
Cassette: Cornell University Chorus and Glee Club present Brahm's ein deutches Requiem
Cassette: The Cornell University Glee Club and Chorus, Senior Week Concert 1997
Video Tape: Chorus Rehearsal Sage Chapel
Video Tape: MacNeil/Lehrer Report: Susan Davenny-Wyner
Magnetic Tape: BRNO Choir at Cornell University
Magnetic Tape: Cornell Chorus Fall Concert
Performance History: Dates and times of Chorus Performances
Cornell University Chorus Picture Album: Misc. Photos through Phon-a-Thon, Spring 1999
Publicity: Misc. Newspaper Clippings and Pamphlets
Social: Paperwork, invitations and information about social events

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 1917 group photograph, New York State Legislative Resolution signed by Steven M. Boggess, commending the Chorus on the occasion of its Sun-Kissed Tour.

did.unittitle: Newsletter Rewrites/Alternative Texts and Newsletter Articles
Alumni Correspondence: Alumnae Lists, Notes, Cards, Postcards
Sokol's Intro Letter and Model Thank-you letter to alumni
Misc. Chorus Documents 3: Business and Membership
Misc. Chorus Documents: Roll-book and Papers
Misc. Chorus Documents 3: Fall 79 Trip Correspondence, Letter to returning members, Letter to incoming Freshmen, Orientation
Misc. Chorus Documents 2: Sponsorship, Mahler 1980, Council Meeting minutes
Awards: For Participation in the 26th and 34th Annual Classic Intercollegiate Women's Glee Club Association Festival Competition
Misc. Chorus Documents 1: Publicity, Singing Strait Breaks, University Correspondence Senior Week
Financial: Misc. Financial and Donation Records
